summary: Maeda has shifted from a months-long bearish stance to calling a market bottom, predicting Bitcoin prices will move higher.
narrative: After successfully shorting ETH for significant profits through late 2025, his most recent video explicitly claims 'The Bottom Is In' for crypto markets. He now advocates for accumulation, suggesting STRC as a leverage play and refuting 4-year cycle theories to forecast immediate upside for BTC.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
